summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Filtro por Aplicación, Catálogo de Informes Pentest CRUD, and Módulo de Seguimiento de Riesgos. All features working correctly. Backend 100% pass rate (13/13 tests). Frontend 100% pass rate (all UI flows verified).

minor.issue: Returns 1 vulnerability with estado_seguimiento='sin_fecha' due to partial date format ('2026' instead of 'YYYY-MM-DD'). String comparison causes false positive.

passed_tests: GET /api/config/informes-pentest - Returns list of 28+ pentest reports
POST /api/config/informes-pentest - Creates new report successfully
POST /api/config/informes-pentest - Rejects duplicate names with 400
PUT /api/config/informes-pentest/{id} - Updates report name and activo status
DELETE /api/config/informes-pentest/{id} - Deletes report successfully
GET /api/seguimiento-riesgos - Returns vulnerabilities with computed fields (dias_restantes, estado_seguimiento)
GET /api/seguimiento-riesgos?filtro=vencidas - Returns 26 overdue vulnerabilities
GET /api/seguimiento-riesgos?filtro=proximas - Returns upcoming vulnerabilities (next 30 days)
GET /api/seguimiento-riesgos/resumen - Returns KPI counters (vencidas:26, criticas_7_dias:0, proximas_30_dias:0, total_pendientes:103)
GET /api/dropdown-options - Includes aplicaciones field (49 applications)
GET /api/dropdown-options - Includes informes_pentest field (29 reports)
GET /api/vulnerabilidades?aplicacion=X - Filters by application correctly
UI: Seguimiento de Riesgos page loads with 4 clickable KPI cards
UI: KPI cards filter the table when clicked (Vencidas filter shows 26 records)
UI: Seguimiento table shows Estado, Fecha Compromiso, Severidad columns
UI: Informes Pentest tab visible in Configuración page
UI: Informes Pentest CRUD - Create new informe works
UI: Informes Pentest CRUD - Delete informe works with confirmation
UI: Vulnerabilidades page has Aplicación filter dropdown (49 options)
UI: Aplicación filter correctly filters vulnerability list
UI: Nueva Vulnerabilidad form has Nombre Informe Pentest as dropdown/Select
UI: Informe Pentest dropdown shows 29 options from catalog
critical_code_review_comments: Minor edge case: fecha_compromiso field accepts partial dates like '2026' which causes incorrect filtering. Consider adding date format validation.
seed_data_creation: Test informe 'TEST_UI_Informe_Enero2026' was created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested and working: 1) Seguimiento de Riesgos module at /seguimiento-riesgos with clickable KPIs (26 vencidas, 0 próx 7d, 0 próx 30d, 103 total), 2) Informes Pentest CRUD in Configuración tab (29 reports), 3) Aplicación filter in Vulnerabilidades (49 apps). The informe_pentest field in vulnerability form is now a Select dropdown. Minor data quality issue: 1 vulnerability has fecha_compromiso='2026' (partial date).
